_comment: NPC: Wang Wei (王伟). Canon ID: N41. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Wang Wei

personality_traits._comment: INFERRED: Wang clan cultivator, measured, moderate traits across the board. Not a village mortal — has seen the cultivation world.

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

desires.what: Ask a sibling to practice martial forms
desires.why: Wang Wei is energetic and wants to become stronger before the aptitude test.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI Ch.1. Wang family children anticipate the aptitude test. An energetic brother would want to train.
desires.line: Come on, let us practice! The test could be any day now.
